ctaPanels.title: For Agencies
ctaPanels.text: Scale multi-client campaigns with automated reporting, creative velocity, and tighter CAC control.

ctaPanels.title: SMB Solutions
ctaPanels.text: Launch and optimize high-converting ad funnels without building an in-house media team.

ctaPanels.title: For Publishers
ctaPanels.text: Increase fill rates and improve inventory value using audience-led segmentation and demand sync.

ctaPanels.title: Unified Media Platform
ctaPanels.text: Bring paid media, creative intelligence, and attribution into one growth operating system.

mediaPartnerCards.title: Retail Media Precision

mediaPartnerCards.label: Unified Reporting
mediaPartnerCards.title: Cross-Channel Attribution
mediaPartnerCards.description: Unify paid social, search, display, and video into one reporting lens that ties spend directly to revenue.

mediaPartnerCards.label: Creative Optimization
mediaPartnerCards.title: AI Creative Intelligence
mediaPartnerCards.description: Test multiple creative angles, rank winners faster, and scale only high-converting assets across channels.

mediaPartnerCards.label: Campaign Integrity
mediaPartnerCards.title: Brand Safety & Trust
mediaPartnerCards.description: Run campaigns in quality environments with fraud screening, transparent metrics, and compliance-first operations.

mediaPartnerCards.label: International Growth
mediaPartnerCards.title: Global Audience Scale
mediaPartnerCards.description: Expand into new regions with localization-ready media plans and pacing controls that protect profitability.

featureCards.title: Performance Media Buying
featureCards.desc: Search, social, and video campaigns tuned for lower CAC and higher conversion quality.
featureCards.detail: We continuously rebalance budget by audience intent, channel efficiency, and creative resonance so your spend compounds into profitable acquisition instead of short-lived spikes.

featureCards.title: Creative Testing System
featureCards.desc: Fast concept iteration with AI plus human curation to scale winning creatives.
featureCards.detail: Every concept is scored against engagement signals and conversion outcomes, helping your team retire weak variants quickly and scale only creatives with proven revenue impact.

featureCards.title: Funnel & CRO Engineering
featureCards.desc: Landing pages and lifecycle flows designed to convert intent into revenue.
featureCards.detail: From first click to final action, we remove conversion friction, tighten message match, and build page structures that guide prospects toward high-intent decisions with less drop-off.

featureCards.title: Attribution Intelligence
featureCards.desc: Unified dashboards connecting spend, lead quality, and closed-won value.
featureCards.detail: You get clear visibility across the full buyer journey, so teams can confidently double down on the channels and campaigns that actually move pipeline and revenue.

industryCards.heading: Pipeline acceleration framework

industryCards.title: EdTech
industryCards.heading: Enrollment conversion system
industryCards.description: Enrollment-oriented funnel systems that improve lead quality while reducing cost per qualified learner.

industryCards.title: Fintech
industryCards.heading: Precision compliance scaling
industryCards.description: High-precision targeting with conversion safeguards to improve activation, retention, and lifetime value.

industryCards.title: Local Services
industryCards.heading: Geo-demand capture strategy
industryCards.description: Geo-smart campaign orchestration that drives local demand, phone calls, and booked appointments.

faqItems.q: How quickly can we launch our first campaign?
faqItems.a: Most brands go live in 7-10 days after we lock targeting, messaging, and creative assets.

faqItems.q: Do you handle creatives and landing pages too?
faqItems.a: Yes. We design AI-assisted concepts, ad variants, and conversion-focused landing pages in one pipeline.

faqItems.q: Can your team scale campaigns internationally?
faqItems.a: Absolutely. We localize messaging, optimize by market, and run geo-based budget orchestration.
You get weekly action summaries, real-time dashboards, and monthly strategic growth reviews.
